hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f tests/pine-visual/.tdd-active ]; then COUNT=$(cat tests/pine-visual/.tdd-active); if [ "$COUNT" -lt 10 ]; then echo "[Pine TDD active — iteration $COUNT/10] Tests still running. Analyse .last-results.json and continue fixing."; cat tests/pine-visual/.last-results.json 2>/dev/null; fi; fi'
